drivers.notes: 1500AL-1 driver with 100 mm 4-layer aluminum voice coil and 16 kg motor structure
476Mg driver loaded into a Sonoglass HF horn integrated with the curved baffle
045Be-1 driver in a Sonoglass UHF horn mated to a die-cast aluminum housing (spec table mislabels material as magnesium — model code and description confirm beryllium)

description.en: Three-way studio reference in JBL's Project K2 lineage — a 380 mm pulp-cone woofer (1500AL-1) with high-magnesium structure, a 100 mm magnesium HF compression driver (476Mg) loaded into a Sonoglass horn integrated with the curved baffle, and a 25 mm beryllium UHF compression driver (045Be-1) extending out to 50 kHz. Crossovers at 900 Hz and 15 kHz; heavily-braced curved cabinet with separate boards per frequency section.
description.es: Referencia de estudio de tres vías en el linaje Project K2 de JBL — un woofer de 380 mm con cono de pulpa (1500AL-1) y estructura magnética de alta-masa, un driver de compresión HF de 100 mm con domo de magnesio (476Mg) cargado en una bocina Sonoglass integrada al bafle curvo, y un driver UHF de 25 mm con domo de berilio (045Be-1) que extiende la respuesta hasta 50 kHz. Crossovers a 900 Hz y 15 kHz; cabinet curvo muy reforzado con boards separados por sección de frecuencia.
